description:
This quiz tests intermediate to advanced JavaScript developers on their understanding of modern ECMAScript versions (ES2015 to ES2022), covering syntax, features, and best practices. It uses a conversational, interactive tone with emojis and playful language to engage learners while assessing their ability to distinguish and apply updated standards.
Topics: ES2015 (ES6) features, ES2016 (ES7) updates, ES2017 (ES8) enhancements, ES2018 (ES9) syntax, ES2019 (ES10) improvements, ES2020 (ES11) additions, ES2021 (ES12) changes, ES2022 (ES13) features
Audience: JavaScript developers seeking to validate or improve their knowledge of modern ECMAScript standards and their practical applications.
